heading: Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
label: 40108 Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4010836:2614 (1st sentence)., (1st sentence), .Aug. 17, 1984Pub. L. 98–382, § 1598 Stat. 1345
